rule: Any consumer-facing entry point not classified here blocks M2 and M6.

integrations.evidence: Restored in M3 as src/orbit/web/mcp.py: JSON-RPC 2.0 over POST /mcp, mounted by the composition root with the same authenticator/authorizer as /api/v1. Tools: list_runs, inspect_run, start_run, cancel_run. Contract tests in tests/test_mcp.py. The pre-8e4d786 FastMCP tool surface is NOT reproduced: mailbox tools are gone and the tool names differ, so the .codex consumer config must be updated.
integrations.auth: same identity + Capability Policy as /api/v1; no anonymous tool calls
integrations.contract_test: M3: initialize, tool discovery, read-only inspect, authorized write command, unauthorized, version conflict, restart, .codex config smoke
integrations.notes: Consumer notified in M6: the server block was renamed devloop -> orbit and the tool surface differs from the pre-8e4d786 FastMCP one (mailbox tools are gone; tools are now list_runs / inspect_run / start_run / cancel_run). Contract tests: tests/test_mcp.py.

integrations.contract_test: M7 package CLI matrix: orbit serve boots on 8848
integrations.notes: Port and command name stay; only routes below it change.

integrations.auth: loopback-only guard, then new auth in M3
integrations.contract_test: M4 browser E2E; M7 package contents
integrations.notes: Same URL, different content. No redirect or alias per plan 2.5.

integrations.contract_test: M6 guard: /workflow-ui absent from route manifest
integrations.notes: Read-only prototype entry. Must not gain mock mutation APIs. Deleted once the modular UI passes real-HTTP smoke.

integrations.consumer: legacy UI canvas; candidate for new UI graph view
integrations.target_url: /ui/assets/dagre.min.js (only if the new UI graph view reuses it)
integrations.contract_test: M4: asset served from /ui/assets/*; M6: /static/* route absent
integrations.notes: Vendored, no CDN. If the new Graph tab does not need dagre, drop the vendor file entirely in M6.

integrations.current_url: 38 unversioned routes under /api/* (tasks, goals, messages, agents, run-jobs, settings, workflow, ...)
integrations.contract_test: M6 guard: route manifest contains no unversioned /api/* mutation route
integrations.notes: No redirect or compatibility alias. Old resources (task, message, goal-as-aggregate) do not exist in the new model.

integrations.current_url: orbit start|up, orbit config|init, orbit runner, orbit workflow db-check
integrations.target_url: orbit serve | workflow validate|publish | run start|inspect | db check
integrations.contract_test: M7 package CLI matrix: legacy commands return argparse unknown command
integrations.notes: orbit serve is the only surviving name. orbit db check replaces the nested orbit workflow db-check with no alias.

blocking_rule: unclassified MUST stay empty; a non-empty list blocks M2 and M6.
